description: A program manager needs to create a formal response to a finding from a recent internal audit.

nodes.task_description: Review the specific audit finding and the auditor's recommendation.

expected_outcome.value: The manager understands the nature of the finding (e.g., lack of proper documentation).

nodes.task_description: Develop a corrective action plan (CAP) to address the finding.

expected_outcome.value: The manager outlines the steps they will take to fix the issue, including new procedures and training.

nodes.task_description: Submit the formal response and CAP to the audit department.

expected_outcome.value: The manager officially submits their response to the audit finding.
